channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Takeaways from Indiana, Ohio and Michigan: Trump’s flex pays off and Democrats win special election
item.description: President Donald Trump is having some success in his latest attempt to politically punish Republicans who stand in his way.

item.title: South Carolina joins Southern redistricting push after US Supreme Court ruling on minority districts
For many Americans, Trump’s immigration crackdown is personal, new AP-NORC poll shows
